subject: [INT-1437] : Incorrect characters causing issues
commit_message:
[INT-1437] : Incorrect characters causing issues

The policy section in the file
~/integration/deployment/heat/onap-rke/staging-image-override.yaml
has the wrong space characters/tabs that is
causing some issues for parsing the yaml file.

Issue-ID: INT-1437
Signed-off-by: DarraghEgan <darragh.egan@est.tech>
Change-Id: I5cc683e12e4bca29f8740ad6b43b2ee8a8414fa1

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1 Code-Review-1

Your change is ok but please fix other issues reported by yaml linter here:

  1:1       warning  missing document start "---"  (document-start)
  25:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4  (indentation)
  34:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4  (indentation)
  38:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4  (indentation)
  39:9      error    wrong indentation: expected 6 but found 8  (indentation)
  41:13     error    wrong indentation: expected 10 but found 12  (indentation)
  43:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4  (indentation)
  45:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4  (indentation)
  63:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4  (indentation)
  83:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4  (indentation)
  94:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4  (indentation)
  114:5     error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4  (indentation)
  116:5     error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4  (indentation)

Patch Set 2:

> Your change is ok but please fix other issues reported by yaml
 > linter here:
 > 
 > 1:1       warning  missing document start "---"  (document-start)
 > 25:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4 
 > (indentation)
 > 34:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4

 > 83:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4 
 > (indentation)
 > 94:5      error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4 
 > (indentation)
 > 114:5     error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4 
 > (indentation)
 > 116:5     error    wrong indentation: expected 2 but found 4 
 > (indentation)

I have changed the indentation on these files.
If you do a yamllint now it will complain about one line having too many characters but that is just the default setting for yamllint.
You can run yamllint -d relaxed staging-image-override.yaml and that will allow a longer line length
